title: The Startup Owner's Manual
subtitle: The Step-by-Step Guide for Building a Great Company
author: Steve Blank

coauthor.name: Bob Dorf
knownFor: Co-author of The Startup Owner's Manual

themes: Startups search for a business model; companies execute one
Customer Development as an alternative to Product Development
Get out of the building — customer interaction is the only source of truth
Hypothesis-driven experimentation replaces rigid business plans
Iterative pivoting based on validated learning
Premature scaling is the #1 killer of startups
Earlyvangelists are the only early customers that matter
awards: Required reading for NSF I-Corps program
Taught at Stanford, Berkeley, Columbia and 100+ universities
Catalyst of the Lean Startup movement
excerpt: The definitive playbook for building a scalable startup using Customer Development. Replace guesswork with validated learning: get out of the building, test hypotheses, find product-market fit, then scale.
